name: TE Buffer

notes.en: Used for dissolving and storing DNA. Autoclave before storage. Low TE (0.1 mM EDTA) is suitable for PCR templates.
notes.zh: 10 mM Tris-HCl, 1 mM EDTA, pH 8.0。DNA 保存标准缓冲液。EDTA 螯合二价阳离子抑制核酸酶。高压灭菌，室温保存。低 TE (0.1 mM EDTA) 适合 PCR 模板。

ref: CSH Protocols; Sambrook & Russell (2001) Molecular Cloning, 3rd ed.
